subject: Re: Warp 1.0.7 keeps crashing
body:
Hi Da,

could you please post the processing parameters and movie dimensions? If 
possible, it would be great if you could privately share a single movie 
through Dropbox or Google Drive so I can reproduce the crash.

Cheers,
Dimitry

On Friday, April 12, 2019 at 7:26:36 PM UTC+2, Da Cui wrote:
>
> Dear community, 
>    I just gave an initial test with Warp 1.0.7 using some unbinned K3 
> data, but it is either crashing, or working with no output and no GPU 
> consumption. I'm using a single 2080 Ti. 
>    Also, when I use Warp 1.0.7 to process some unbinned K2 data (which is 
> working properly on Warp 1.0.6), it is still crashing when I choose 
> "particle picking". 
>    Is it just a special case, or is there anyone else encountering the 
> same issue?
>    Thank you so much for your help!
>
> Best wishes, 
>         Da 
>
